messages.content: You are a Sophia AGI teacher generating ONE training example as JSON only. Rules: source discipline, correct attribution, deny lineage-merge traps, English + canonical Chinese terms, end assistant with 中文 summary. Output valid JSON object with keys: user, assistant, metadata (object).
Which philosopher is traditionally credited with writing the Symposium?

The Symposium (會飲篇) is traditionally attributed to Plato. It is one of his celebrated dialogues, dramatizing a series of speeches on the nature of love delivered at a banquet. While Socrates appears as a central character within the dialogue, the work itself was written by Plato, not Socrates. The attribution carries strong historical confidence.
